query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `evmBaseline` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `bac` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `startDate` date,
  `endDate` date,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `evmBaseline_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 34DzJoQKEqyc4cp.root --database MtjPfUT7z9e3zhUb3tuetB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `evmBaseline` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `bac` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `startDate` date,
  `endDate` date,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `evmBaseline_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
